title: Azure KV: slashes in secret name not rejected at from_uri
description: split_path() splits on first '/' only, so secretx://azure-kv/myvault/my/secret gives secret_name='my/secret'. Azure Key Vault secret names must match [0-9a-zA-Z-] and do not allow slashes, so this will fail at runtime with an Azure API error instead of InvalidUri at construction. GCP SM already checks secret.contains('/') in split_project_secret. Azure should do the same.
